title: Lore
description: This Minecraft mod aims to add historical figures from the history of Minecraft and its lore. By allowing you to play as these characters. You can also troll your friends pretty well too ;P
body:
This mod aims to add the ability to become characters from Minecraft lore, allowing you access to different abilities and ways to interact with the world.
(It's probably more entertaining to mess with your friends with this mod)


**Currently in the mod:**
1. Null sword & Null, Herobrine, Entity 303 armors (Only obtainable in creative mod or through commands at the moment)

2. Playing a spooky noise through a key bind ability. (Has a cooldown)

3. Changing the time to night. (Has a cooldown, also detects if it's currently day)

4. Striking lightning in the spot you're looking at 

5. Toggleable nametag visibility

6. Toggleable invisibility with armor currently equipped 

**Next planned update:**

1. Troll armors - Armors that look, have the same durability and armor as vanilla armors, but...with you guessed it!! Abilities!

2. Emissive Textures for the armors (Making the eyes glow in the dark, and hopefully work with shaders)

**Can't be added in the next update until I figure out how to do it:**

1. Jumpscare ability - The ability to either crouch or press a keybind while you're wearing the armor, while near another player or looking at a player, and then jumpscaring them (Figuring out how to do this one at the moment)

2. Invisible Armor - Armor others won't see on your character that will have abilities you can use

3. Displaying ability cooldowns on HUD

4. Blocks and decor

**Planned for the future:**
- Dimensions for each character
- A way to display ability cooldowns on HUD
- Lots of blocks and décor
- Progression to obtain ways to become each character
- More ways to troll your friends with the mod c:
- Jumpscare Mechanics
- Way more abilities
